summary: Card created for generation queue/cue/stop/dual-engine refactor; investigation in progress (4 agents).

Investigation complete (4 agents, research/ x4). Large adaptive plan attached: generationStore state machine, cancellation tokens, SSE engine tagging/merge, derived UI, reconcile-on-truth. Foundation parallel batch + phases 2-5.
todo -> doing: picking up Foundation batch (B1-A/B/C) via mpi-execute-parallel.

Foundation batch (B1-A/B/C) COMPLETE + live-verified. B1-A store 13/13 tests. B1-B SSE tagging/merge live-proven (engine=local frames + engine=remote merged relay). B1-C engineOverride + R31 selector live-proven: local(10 models) vs remote(2) via /check-local routing. R31 needed cross-fence modelRegistry.js+shell.js edits (done post-MPI-209 commit). Probes reverted, lint clean, uncommitted. Phases 2-5 remain (store not yet in live gen path).

Phase 2 COMPLETE (auto-verified). commandExecutor.js reworked onto generationStore: job registered at engine+arch freeze; _abortedBail after every await boundary (no /prompt POST on Stop-before-dispatch, disease 3); _modelInitializing closure replaced by store phase (loading/sampling helpers, prompt_ack->accepted, finish->settle done, catch->settle error); SSE listeners engine-filtered via _frameEngineMatches (disease 2); exec.cancel()->store.cancel(jobId) with frozen interruptCb. +1 events.js JSDoc line, +T14 store test. 14/14 store + 14/14 resolver green; parses clean. Uncommitted. Live Stop-during-LOADING check deferred to user. Phases 3-5 remain.

Phase 2 LIVE-VERIFIED by user: local gen Stop DURING LOADING MODEL stopped cleanly (disease-3 orphan-prompt fix works end-to-end). Auto also green (14/14 store incl T14, resolver suite, parse). Uncommitted. Handoff created for Phase 3 (56e65b4e) — Phase 3 not started; handed off at design boundary. Plan Drift note records the store-vs-cueQueue layering tension + recommends Option A (keep _cueQueue as pending-intent holder, store owns lane/loop/running truth).

Phase 3 LIVE-VERIFIED by user (R05/R07/R18/R04/R08) + 3 console-fix rounds re-tested clean. Round1: sampling->loading legal + terminal-race warns silenced + no-output warn gated !cancelling. Round2: submitting->work legal + setPromptId decoupled from prompt_ack. Round3: interruptCb deleteQueueItem(promptId) kills a cancelled-but-queued prompt (fixed cancelled-gen-completes-on-next-start). 20/20 store (+T15-T20) + resolver + lint + parse green. UNCOMMITTED. Residuals: blob-404 -> MPI-211; empty-bar + stale-suffix -> Phase 4. Handoff for Phase 4 created.

Phase 4 CODE COMPLETE + auto-verified (awaiting user-ux). Delivered: (1) genId bridge — startGeneration _regId -> payload.genId -> store.register({genId}) + activeGenerations.start({id}) so the derived bar correlates a store job to its tool:* events (store genId was null); (2) statusBar store-derived latch/idle via generation-store:changed — survivor re-latch (fixes empty-bar) + self-heal to idle on missed terminal + _stageText cleared on display-job change (fixes stale 4/4); job.genId!==null guard excludes suppressed tool-panel previews; (3) _runLocal mirror removed, forceLocal derives from state.engineOverride (B1-C complete). Blocks/QueuePanel needed NO edits (cancel already store-backed facades, overlays already rebuilt on mount). isGenerating/QueuePanel store-snapshot migration skipped (churn, no behavior change). Auto: 20/20 store (+genId assertion), lint:components + eslint(statusBar+services) clean, node --check all 6 files OK. UNCOMMITTED. Phase 5 remains.

Phase 4 LIVE-VERIFIED by user in the Electron app: (1) 2026-07-06 stuck-bar repro -> bar idle every time; (2) two-lane survivor re-latch -> no empty bar; (3) upscale-then-non-upscale -> no stale 4/4 suffix; (4) cloud toggle routes local/remote. statusBar now store-derived; genId bridge live; _runLocal removed. UNCOMMITTED. Phase 5 (reconcile-on-truth + regression sweep + docs) remains.

Phase 5 COMPLETE. Reconcile-on-truth: 5s dual-engine store poll NOT built (duplicate coverage/empty set — every runWorkflow exit settles the store; remote backstopped by _startHistoryPoll, local by WS-close reject). Shipped 'generation recovered' ui:info toast on _reconcileFromHistory success (archaeology Part-4 gap). Regression checklist written (research/regression-checklist.md, per-row R01-R31/INV/19-bug). Docs updated (user-approved): events.md, component-state.md, comfy_engine.md §2.5a, ui-gotchas.md. Auto: test:desktop 10/10 + store 20/20 + resolver 14/14 + lint + parse green. UNCOMMITTED.

maturity in-progress -> validating (stays in doing column). All phases code-complete: Foundation + Phase 2 + Phase 3 (live) + Phase 4 (live) + Phase 5 (auto). Awaiting final 7-point end-to-end user acceptance + commit via mpi-end.

CLOSE-GATE: inbox msg 6d4e3f09 (from MPI-212 session) reports a PiD upscale that completes but leaves the Cue lane stuck '1 RUNNING' — an MPI-208-machinery regression (settle(DONE) no-op on a pre-cancelled job; lane intent _lanes.active strands). Diagnosed + replied (0c4d4f48) + filed as MPI-213 (todo). MPI-208 must NOT move to done until MPI-213 is resolved OR the drain bug is explicitly confirmed out-of-scope. Phase-4 statusBar self-heals (bar won't strand) but the Cue PANEL + isGenerating read _lanes.active, not the store — that's the remaining derive-from-store gap MPI-213 will close.

MPI-213 (the inbox stuck-drain) ROOT-CAUSED + FIXED: it was a lane-key mismatch introduced by my Phase-3 lane rewrite — _laneOf keyed the intent lane on forceLocal alone ('remote' when false) while the store keys the job lane on the RESOLVED engine ('local' when no Pod), so a no-Pod local gen's drain fired the wrong loop callback and stranded the intent as phantom '1 RUNNING'. Fix: _laneOf now mirrors the store's engine->lane rule (js/services/generationService.js) + guard test lane-agreement.test.cjs. Logic-verified; MPI-213 doing/validating, needs a live no-Pod local-gen confirm. MPI-208 close now gated only on: (1) MPI-213 live confirm, (2) the final 7-point end-to-end acceptance.
